action: Determine the project's target platform (Windows) and app type (local web dashboard using Flask, developed in PyCharm) based on user requirements.
fallback_action: If requirements are unclear or missing, log the issue to iteration_report.log and prompt user for clarification. If no response within the iteration, provide recommended platform/app type options.

recipe.steps: Ask the user to specify the target platform and app type for the project.
